document_id: DAAS 20 15 2020 21 Senior Center General Purpose Funding

findings.description: Auto-correction of a numbering typo in the 'Centers of Excellence' table.
findings.evidence: In the PDF (page 3), the numbering skips 54 and repeats 55: '53 Mecklenburg...', '55 Mecklenburg Shamrock...', '55 Mecklenburg Tyvola...'. The generated HTML corrected the sequence to: '53', '54', '55'.
